name: Drumcode

sub_labels: South Of Saturn; North Of Neptune
why_it_belongs: Where Mau P broke through. Openly accepts demos.

why_it_belongs: Fun, quirky lane; a known career-launcher.

why_it_belongs: Cloonee's label — built for unknowns; charts constantly.

why_it_belongs: Open submissions; growing fast (Dom Dolla's home).

why_it_belongs: Huge catalogue; one submission effectively covers ~11 sub-labels.

name: Knee Deep In Sound
why_it_belongs: Hot Since 82's label — a less-competitive melodic lane.

why_it_belongs: Sweat It Out's house imprint — Australian reach; good for emerging artists.

why_it_belongs: Reviews demos live on Twitch — the most transparent route in the scene.

name: Glasgow Underground

name: Saved Records
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Nic Fanciulli's label — strong tech house pedigree and booking reach.

name: Desert Hearts
requirements: Submit via the Trackstack portal
why_it_belongs: Beloved US house/techno collective and festival brand — 'House, Techno & Love'.

name: Box of Cats

why_it_belongs: Demo-friendly bass/tech house imprint that actively breaks new artists.

name: Cuttin' Headz
why_it_belongs: The Martinez Brothers' label — explicitly 'always on the lookout for new talent'.

requirements: Submit when the demo form is open (e.g. the 'Caddyshack' Tech/Bass House window)
why_it_belongs: Golf Clap's demo-friendly label; runs a recurring 'Demo Tapes' series for unknowns.

why_it_belongs: Tchami's label (Paris, 2015) — a leading future/bass house brand.

name: Higher Ground
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Diplo's house label — high-profile and growing, with major booking/streaming reach.

name: Night Bass
why_it_belongs: AC Slater's label — the defining home of bass house.

why_it_belongs: Solomun's label — one of the most prestigious melodic/tech house brands, with major booking and streaming reach.

why_it_belongs: Three-decade Berlin house/tech house institution with deep catalogue and scene respect.

why_it_belongs: Radio Slave's respected UK label (since 2006) — strong underground techno/house credibility.

why_it_belongs: Long-running, highly respected house/tech house label (Deep Dish) with global reach.

requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Lee Burridge's label — the defining organic/melodic house brand and event series.

name: Under No Illusion
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Eli Brown's label — one of the hottest current tech house/techno crossover names.

why_it_belongs: Consistent tech house imprint with reliable Beatport presence; openly demo-friendly.

name: Abode Records
requirements: Submit via the ABODE Records Trackstack portal
why_it_belongs: Strong UK tech house party brand and label; actively solicits demos.

name: Eastenderz
why_it_belongs: East End Dubs' label — a leader in the minimal/tech house ('minimal dub') wave.

name: PIV Records
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Amsterdam tech/deep house label (since 2014) with a distinctive, well-regarded sound.

name: Heldeep
requirements: Drop an MP3 via the LabelRadar 'Drop Your Demo' portal
why_it_belongs: Oliver Heldens' label — high-profile, with major streaming and festival reach.

name: Perfect Havoc
requirements: Upload via the on-site portal | They listen to everything but cannot reply to each
why_it_belongs: UK house/dance-pop label with a track record of breaking new artists (e.g. Joel Corry).

name: Nervous Records
requirements: Check the label site for current submission guidelines before sending
why_it_belongs: Iconic NYC house institution (since 1991) — deep heritage and ongoing releases.

name: Hottrax
requirements: Upload track privately to SoundCloud with downloads and comments enabled | include name and contact details in track description
why_it_belongs: Jamie Jones' more club-focused label (sister to Hot Creations) — actively scouts producers.

name: MoBlack Records
genre_tags: afro house; deep house; melodic house & tech; tribal
requirements: Send private SoundCloud links only | No file attachments
why_it_belongs: Consistently #1–2 top-selling label in Beatport's Afro House genre. Founded 2013 by Italian-Ghanaian producer MoBlack, it is the defining imprint of modern afro house globally, with hundreds of releases and a verified open demo email. High streaming credibility, strong booking impact, and openly accessible to unknowns.

name: Stay True Sounds
genre_tags: afro house; deep house; soulful house
key_people: Kid Fonque (co-founder); Jullian Gomes (co-founder); Louie Dunmore (Defected A&R)
requirements: Use private SoundCloud links for email route | LabelRadar portal for streamlined submission
why_it_belongs: South African deep/afro house label co-founded by Kid Fonque and Jullian Gomes; acquired by Defected Records. Has LabelRadar portal AND an email route, both publicly accessible. Defected partnership gives global streaming and retail reach. Accessible to unknown artists through both channels.

name: Sondela Recordings
genre_tags: afro house; afro electronic; deep house
key_people: Louie Dunmore (A&R / label head); Cleido (creative director)
why_it_belongs: Defected's dedicated afro house imprint, launched 2021. Active Boiler Room partnerships, continuous 2024–2026 releases (Sondela Sampler series). Strong global streaming reach under Defected umbrella. Dedicated demo email confirmed on their own website.

name: Madorasindahouse
genre_tags: afro house; deep house; afro electronic
why_it_belongs: Greece's leading afro house label and party brand; 10+ years running events across Europe and Africa. Strong Beatportal presence. Dedicated demo emails confirmed on their own contact page. Scene respect high in European afro house circuit, accessible to unknown artists.

name: Offering Recordings
genre_tags: afro house; ancestral soul; deep house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2007 by Congolese-Portuguese producer Boddhi Satva, a pioneer of 'ancestral soul' — spiritual afro house. Very active in 2024–2025 with multiple releases monthly. Beatport and Traxsource presence strong. Open demo email confirmed on labelsbase.net; consistent releases show active A&R.

name: Set About
genre_tags: tech house; afro tech; deep tech
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Boutique tech house label with afro-infused sensibility (Beatport label ID 54025). Active release schedule. Confirmed demo email on labelsbase.net with SoundCloud link requirement. Accessible to unknown artists; demo process clearly articulated.

name: LouLou Records
genre_tags: tech house; latin tech house; jackin house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Belgian label founded by LouLou Players with strong Latin/Brazilian tech house flavor. 116 tech house releases on Beatport, active 2024–2025 (Summer Sampler 2025, Best Of 2024/2025 compilations). Accessible via email with SoundCloud link. Kolombo handles A&R; label friendly to new talent.

name: Tribe Records
genre_tags: afro house; deep house; soulful house
why_it_belongs: Boutique London label founded by Zepherin Saint — a key figure in afro house history. 37 Beatport afro house releases, active 2024–2025 (confirmed via Beatport year range). Soul, afro and jazz at its core. General enquiries email confirmed on their own website. Accessible to unknown artists.

name: Afroterraneo Music
genre_tags: afro house; afro latin; balearic afro house
why_it_belongs: Label founded by Mallorcan DJ Kiko Navarro blending African rhythms with Mediterranean/Balearic vibes. Very active in 2025–2026 on Beatport (multiple monthly releases). Strong Afro House/Afro Latin presence. Contact via Bandcamp form confirmed; no dedicated demo email found on official site.

name: Cacao Records
genre_tags: afro house; deep house; latin tech house; tech house
why_it_belongs: Berlin-based Central American label with 127 Beatport afro house releases. Active in 2024–2026 (Best Of 2024, Best Of 2025 compilations). Key artists include David Mayer and Re.you. Strong afro/latin house flavor that fits the slice. Bandcamp contact form is the confirmed public channel.

name: Sccucci Manucci
requirements: Do NOT send messages via SoundCloud inbox
why_it_belongs: London-based boutique label with long-running afro/house credibility; active in 2026 (VRRS 'Chtapodi' May 2026). Beatport and Traxsource presence. Known in the scene for eclectic, quality-focused curation. Demo contact confirmed via multiple sources.

name: Watergate Records
genre_tags: deep house; afro house; melodic house & techno
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | High production quality expected
why_it_belongs: Berlin club-label with elite reputation; 25 afro house releases on Beatport, active in 2024–2025. Releases afro house alongside melodic/deep house and techno. Demonstrated demo email published on labelsbase.net; however, given its prestige (Berlin club imprint), unknown artists face a high quality bar. Warm intro strongly advised, though email is technically public.

name: Vatos Locos
genre_tags: tech house; afro tech; latin tech house
why_it_belongs: Barcelona-based label by DJ Hector with strong Latin/afro-inflected tech house releases on Beatport. Scene respect is high in the tech house circuit. No publicly confirmed demo email found — social channels (Instagram @vatos.locos.official, SoundCloud) are the only accessible contact points. Likely needs a warm introduction or direct DM with strong music.

name: Hood Politics Records
why_it_belongs: San Diego–based collective (also described as Chicago-rooted) with strong Beatport presence across bass house, tech house and house. Actively releasing in 2024 (e.g. 'Pretty Boy Swag' by Proppa, Dec 2024; 'Six Five Four' by Shifty, Sept 2024). Known for community-driven curation and open to unknown artists via a stated always-on A&R policy. Scenes respect + streaming credibility well established.

name: House of Hustle
requirements: private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Boutique dance label founded 2014 with a strong Beatport catalog (640+ tech house tracks, 59+ bass house). Dedicated 'attitude' aesthetic across big basslines, 808s and party-focused club music. Active on Beatport through 2024-2025. Listed on LabelRadar, confirming they actively use the platform to manage demo intake. Well-suited to an unknown artist with polished tech/bass house material.

name: Dim Mak Records
genre_tags: bass house; tech house; house; electro house
requirements: private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Independent LA label founded by Steve Aoki in 1996. Has a dedicated /demos page and official email; maintains LabelRadar portal. Active 2024-2025 across bass house and tech house (e.g., Rich DietZ 'House Music & Anime' 2025). Known for 'New Noise' imprint discovering emerging talent. Beatport presence is strong and genre scope includes house and bass-adjacent. Accessible to unknown artists per their own stated 'by any means necessary' ethos.

name: Bunny Tiger
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2012 by Sharam Jey with a 'DJ tools for DJs' philosophy. Active through 2024-2025 on Beatport (91+ tech house, 8+ bass house releases). Consistent label with scene respect and a roster of international underground talent. Beatport, Traxsource and RA profiles all active. Contact email is public and the requirement for private SoundCloud links indicates they actively manage demo intake.

name: REALM Records
genre_tags: house; tech house; melodic house; afro house; deep house
why_it_belongs: Founded 2018 by Gorgon City. Active and growing in 2024-2025 (album 'Reverie' via REALM & Astralwerks 2024; Beatport imprint presence confirmed via ADE 2024 chart). Strong streaming credibility and scene respect (Gorgon City are booking-relevant headline acts). Accepts demos via public email and tstack portal per confirmed official channels. Genres include house and tech house which crossover well with US-leaning bass house producers.

name: IN/ROTATION (Insomniac Records)
genre_tags: tech house; house; bass house; deep house
why_it_belongs: Insomniac's dedicated house/tech-house imprint since 2017. 'Rotate' compilation series runs into Vol. 15+ (2025), demonstrating sustained commissioning activity. Parent company Insomniac runs major US festivals (EDC, HARD) — label exposure translates directly to booking visibility. LabelRadar portal is the confirmed submission channel (labelradar.com/labels/insomniac/portal), one of the strongest cold-submit platforms in the industry. Actively accepting house, tech house, deep house, melodic techno.

name: Stress Records
genre_tags: house; tech house; nu disco; deep house
why_it_belongs: Long-running UK-based house label run by Needwant Limited (also behind Future Disco). Very active through 2025-2026 (multiple Club Culture volumes; April 2026 releases confirmed on Bandcamp). Beatport and Beatsource presence strong. Known for artists like Ben Hemsley, Friend Within, Emily Nash. Has a Discord community for fans and the demo email is publicly listed on the official contact page — good accessibility signal.

name: Sleazy Deep
genre_tags: deep house; house; nu disco; tech house
why_it_belongs: London-based collective founded 2011 by Rob Made. Nu skool disco, deep house funk and ultra-modern sonics — crossover appeal for US bass/house producers. Confirmed active in 2024: 'Everything Changes EP' released May 10 2024; 'CLUBTRAXX Vol 1' released April 12 2024 (both confirmed on Bandcamp). Beatport chart positions and Mixmag support documented. Sub-label Sleazy G features G-house artists including Amine Edge & DANCE and Shiba San, directly relevant to the bass-house crossover target.

name: Late Checkout Records
genre_tags: bass house; house; UK bass; garage
why_it_belongs: Founded 2022 by Chris Lorenzo (UK) with a clear bass house and garage-influenced identity. Active through Dec 2024: 'U Should Not Be Doing That' with Amyl & The Sniffers (Dec 2024), 'Pump' AC Slater Remix (Jul 2024). Strong Beatport presence in bass house genre. Has a dedicated /demos page (latecheckout.info/demos) that was indexed, indicating active intake. Direct crossover with US bass house scene via AC Slater collaboration; accessible to unknown artists.

name: Glitterbox Recordings
genre_tags: soulful house; disco house; nu-disco; vocal house
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | Genre: soulful house, disco-influenced house, vocal house
why_it_belongs: Defected's premium soulful-house and disco sub-label; Purple Disco Machine, Mousse T., Folamour, The Shapeshifters. Officially opened submissions via LabelRadar in 2023 — the first time Defected/Glitterbox accepted cold demos. Strong Beatport, Traxsource and streaming credibility; major booking impact; scene royalty.

name: Classic Music Company
genre_tags: deep house; classic house; soulful house; disco
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | Classic / deep / soulful house only
why_it_belongs: Set up in 1994 by Derrick Carter and Luke Solomon — the originators of classic Chicago house — now operating as a Defected-distributed imprint. Honey Dijon, Eli Escobar, Red Rack'em, Juan Maclean. Elite scene respect, strong Beatport and booking pull, now fully open via LabelRadar.

name: Freerange Records
requirements: Email with private SoundCloud link | Deep / soulful house focus
why_it_belongs: London-based deep house institution since 1997 — 28 years, 300+ EPs. Home to Jimpster, Detroit Swindle, Milton Jackson, Lovebirds, Manuel Tur. Beatport and Traxsource chart regular. Active as of June 2025 with new Jimpster/OVEOUS release. Premier scene credibility; genuinely reachable for unknown artists via email.

name: Delusions of Grandeur
requirements: Email via general contact | Deep, underground house and disco only
why_it_belongs: London's premier deep-house-and-disco boutique label since 2009. Tom Roberts and Jimpster curate with extreme care; Session Victim, Gerd, Levantine. Active through 2025 (Constellation EP Jan 2025). Beatport and Traxsource presence. Warm reputation for breaking unknown artists that fit the sound.

name: Local Talk
genre_tags: deep house; classic house; soulful house
requirements: Use Bandcamp contact form or reach out via social channels | Classic / soulful deep house
why_it_belongs: Stockholm-based deep-house label run by Mad Mats and Tooli since 2009; lauded for bringing Scandinavian deep house to global dancefloors. Active on Beatport and Traxsource with 2024-2025 releases. Both founders personally listen to every demo. Scene respect among deep house purists.

name: Dirt Crew Recordings
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Allow 2-3 weeks for response | Every demo is listened to
why_it_belongs: Berlin-based deep-house label since 2004, 200+ releases. Selection 2024 compilation released Dec 2024 — definitively active. Beatport and Traxsource listed. Known for working with unknown artists across genres. Published demo email and turnaround promise publicly on their website.

name: Z Records
genre_tags: deep house; soulful house; disco; nu-disco
requirements: Send links — NOT MP3s | Email gordon@zrecords.ltd.uk
why_it_belongs: Founded 1990 by Dave Lee (Joey Negro); one of the longest-running UK soul/house labels. Z Records sits at the intersection of deep house, nu-disco and soulful house — perfectly aligned. Beatport presence, regular DJ chart appearances. Open to unknown artists; demo email published publicly.

name: Razor-N-Tape
genre_tags: deep house; disco; nu-disco; classic house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Brooklyn-born disco and deep house label since 2012. Known for original house, disco edits and compilations. Family Affair Vol. 4 dropped Dec 2024 — definitively active. 100+ releases, Beatport and Traxsource presence. Known to bring in fresh talent; accessible demo contact.

name: Shall Not Fade
genre_tags: deep house; house; soulful house; UK house
requirements: Artist name | Instagram handle | Previous label history | Private SoundCloud playlist link (as many tracks as possible) | Email address | Additional info / planned releases
why_it_belongs: Bristol-based label launched Dec 2015. Active release schedule on Beatport and Traxsource. Runs a dedicated Google Form for demo submissions — one of the most open, artist-friendly submission systems for underground house. Covers SNF, Time Is Now, Lost Palms sub-labels. Scene respect among UK house community.

name: Wolf Music Recordings
requirements: Email Matt Neale directly
why_it_belongs: UK-based independent deep house and disco label since 2009. Active through 2025-2026 (Tom Esselle EP Feb 2026, Beatportal Hype Label of the Month). Frits Wentink, Retromigration, Harold Heath. Genuine underground credibility; Beatport and Traxsource presence. One of the most respected UK deep house boutique labels.

name: Toy Tonics
genre_tags: deep house; disco; nu-disco; Italo house; indie dance
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Berlin-based independent label and culture crew since 2012. Monthly EPs on vinyl and digital. Releases Kapote, Alma Negra, Harvey Sutherland remixes. Italomania Vol. 3 (2024) and consistent 2025 releases confirm active status. Beatport, Traxsource, Kompakt distribution. Known for eclectic, funky, disco-influenced house.

name: Permanent Vacation
genre_tags: disco; nu-disco; Balearic; cosmic house; deep house
requirements: Label cannot return unsolicited material unless stamped addressed envelope included | Do not send physical material without return envelope
why_it_belongs: Munich/Berlin label since 2006 run by Tom Bioly and Benjamin Fröhlich. Premier European disco and cosmic house imprint. Selected Label Works 12 released Dec 2025, confirming current activity. Strong Beatport, Traxsource, and streaming presence. Respected across the Balearic/disco/deep spectrum; open to unsolicited demos.

name: Soul Clap Records
genre_tags: deep house; soulful house; funk; R&B house
requirements: Email to records@soulclap.us
why_it_belongs: Boston-based label founded on deep house and soul. Soul Clap Records was started specifically because they were receiving outstanding demos — demos drive the label. Active in 2024-2025 (Amazement Aug 2024, EcoSystemS Mar 2024). Beatport and Traxsource presence. Famous duo run it personally.

name: Aus Music
genre_tags: deep house; melodic house; leftfield house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: London label founded 2006 by Will Saul (Simple Records) and Fink. Celebrated 200th release in 2024 with celebratory EP series; Sunchaser released Feb 2026 — definitively active. Beatport top-selling deep house. 'Label of the Month' April 2025 on Beatportal. Releases club-ready music with cultured edge. Genuinely listens to demos.

name: King Street Sounds
genre_tags: soulful house; deep house; vocal house; classic house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Soulful/deep house focus
why_it_belongs: Founded 1993 at the Paradise Garage era in NYC; one of the oldest and most respected independent house labels. Under Armada Music partnership since 2024. House Music Royalty documentary Dec 2024. Dennis Ferrer, David Morales, Ultra Naté alumni. Beatport, Traxsource, Armada distribution. Premium scene legitimacy. Sub-labels Nite Grooves and Street King also reach.

name: Skylax Records
formats: streaming link; file attachment via contact form
requirements: Use contact form at skylaxrecords.com/en/nous-contacter | Or email contact@skylaxrecords.com
why_it_belongs: French label since 2004 run by Hardrock Striker; mission to release timeless music that stands apart. Skylax Mega Bundle Dec 2024 confirms active. Beatport and Traxsource listed. Bridge.audio submission directory active. Nurtures emerging artists alongside seasoned DJs. Underground European house credibility.

name: Heist Recordings
genre_tags: deep house; soulful house; underground house
requirements: Use general contact form on website | No dedicated demo email confirmed
why_it_belongs: Amsterdam label founded by Dam Swindle — champions of underground house, Cinthie, DJ Sneak, Byron the Aquarius, Crackazat. Compilation of biggest anthems released Aug 2024 confirms active. Beatport and Traxsource presence. Strong scene respect and booking pull. However, known to receive far more demos than they can handle.

name: Nurvous Records
genre_tags: nu-disco; indie dance; disco; deep house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Indie dance / nu-disco focus for Nurvous specifically
why_it_belongs: NYC sub-label of Nervous Records since 2011; focuses on indie dance and nu-disco — sits squarely in the disco/deep house crossover zone. 1518+ Beatport releases; active through 2024-2025 per Beatport catalog. Accessible via the Nervous Records A&R contact. Accessible to unknown artists in the indie dance/nu-disco space.

name: D4 D4NCE
genre_tags: deep house; soulful house; underground house
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | Underground house focus
why_it_belongs: Defected sub-label focused on underground house with commercial appeal. Part of the same Defected LabelRadar ecosystem as Glitterbox and Classic Music Company — one submission potentially reaching multiple Defected imprints. Active releases on Beatport. Good entry point for deep house artists targeting the Defected ecosystem without competing directly with the main imprint.

name: Spinnin' Records
key_people: Roger de Graaf (A&R); Eelko van Kooten (CEO)
requirements: Original tracks only, no remixes/bootlegs | Submit via Talent Pool platform or email with private SoundCloud link | One track per week limit on Talent Pool | Must be 18+ or have parental consent | 3-month exclusivity window
why_it_belongs: World's leading dance label with massive Beatport chart presence, global festival reach, and an open Talent Pool platform that actively signs unknown artists. Active tech-house and house releases in 2025. 3-month review window, weekly A&R feedback.

name: Spinnin' Deep
requirements: Submit via Talent Pool portal or email with private SoundCloud link | Tech House, House, Deep House accepted
why_it_belongs: House/tech-house sublabel of the world's biggest dance label. Active with tech-house releases in 2025 (e.g., Joshwa 'Say My Name'). Shares the Talent Pool submission pipeline — slightly less competitive than main Spinnin' Records for underground-leaning house.

name: Insomniac Records
formats: SoundCloud link; audio file via LabelRadar
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | House, Tech House, Melodic Techno, Progressive House accepted
why_it_belongs: Flagship label of Insomniac Music Group — the dominant US festival company (EDC, HARD). Strong Beatport chart presence, massive festival placement, direct career catalyst for unknown artists. Has active LabelRadar portal. Covers deep house, tech house, melodic across their group labels.

name: STMPD RCRDS
requirements: Original tracks only — no remixes, no bootlegs | Must connect SoundCloud account to submit via portal | Submit once
why_it_belongs: Martin Garrix's own imprint with massive streaming and festival reach. Has a dedicated public demo-drop portal. Active releases in 2025. Strong Tomorrowland and festival alignment. Career-launching for lesser-known acts.

name: Armada Music
requirements: Include artist background, achievements, track description, music style in under 10 sentences | Private SoundCloud link preferred | Also accepts via LabelRadar
why_it_belongs: One of the world's largest independent dance labels. Home to Armada Subjekt (house/tech-house), Armada Captivating, and more. Strong Beatport chart presence, streaming credibility, and open demo intake via DemoDrop platform.

name: Armada Subjekt
requirements: Email with subject line: 'Demo for Armada Subjekt' | Private SoundCloud link | Or submit via demodrop.armadamusic.com
why_it_belongs: Armada Music's dedicated house and tech-house imprint. Active with 2025 releases (Miami, Ibiza compilations). Strong Beatport and streaming presence. Shares submission pipeline with Armada parent — directly accessible.

name: Musical Freedom
requirements: Private SoundCloud link only | Original tracks preferred
why_it_belongs: Tiësto's own imprint with strong streaming, festival and radio reach. Multiple recent releases. Publicly listed demo email confirmed via official Twitter post and secondary sources. Good discovery vehicle for crossover house acts.

name: mau5trap
formats: SoundCloud link (private); file upload via LabelRadar
requirements: Submit only one song at a time | Original work only | Progressive house, techno, electro house preferred
why_it_belongs: deadmau5's imprint with decades of dance music credibility. Active LabelRadar portal confirmed. 'We Are Friends Vol. 12' compilation launched 2026 as explicit open call for unknown artists — strong discovery track record (REZZ, Kasablanca, i_o). Active releases in 2025-2026.

name: Protocol Recordings
requirements: Exclusivity required — do not submit same demo to other labels simultaneously | No bootlegs, mash-ups, or promos | Submit via on-page widget or LabelRadar | Submit only once; allow up to 30 days for response
why_it_belongs: Nicky Romero's imprint with strong festival and streaming reach. Fully open demo submission page on official site, plus LabelRadar. Regularly gives public demo feedback on Twitch. Active releases in 2025.

name: HEXAGON
formats: private SoundCloud link; file upload via Trackstack
requirements: House, Bass House, Club Bangers preferred | Submit via Trackstack on hexagonhq.com | Don Diablo personally reviews submissions
why_it_belongs: Don Diablo's own label celebrating 10 years in 2025. Strong Beatport chart presence, Hexagon Radio in 68+ countries, and Tomorrowland residency. Entered 'HEXAGON 2.0' era 2025. Claims Don opens every demo personally. Active house/future-house releases.

name: Smash The House
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike's label with massive festival footprint (Tomorrowland headliners). Active releases in 2025. Weekly radio show with 655+ episodes. Has Generation Smash sublabel for emerging artists. Open demo email confirmed via labelsbase.net.

name: Monstercat Silk
requirements: Submit original work only | Progressive House, Deep House, House, Chillout accepted
why_it_belongs: Monstercat's house and progressive imprint. Active 2025 releases (Silk Selections 06, Dec 2025). Fully open LabelRadar portal. Strong Spotify editorial and streaming presence. Acquired from Silk Music label, legitimate progressive house home for emerging producers.

name: Future House Music
requirements: Submit via Trackstack platform | Also accepts via LabelRadar: labelradar.com/labels/futurehousemusic/portal
why_it_belongs: Specialist label and community with Beatport chart presence and strong streaming reach. Active label with 2025 releases on Traxsource. Known for supporting unknown artists via monthly demo drops, feedback sessions, and community events.

name: This Ain't Bristol
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Specialist tech-house/UK-influenced house label from Hannover, Germany. Active June 2025 releases on Beatport. Strong scene respect, Insomniac feature ('Cut from the Catalog'). Explicitly demo-friendly — publicly stated they don't care about name recognition, only music quality.

name: Sirup Music
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only when using email | Also accepts via LabelRadar and DemoDrop (sirupmusic.demodrop.com)
why_it_belongs: Switzerland's leading dance label, founded 2001, with 2B+ streams, Ibiza and Las Vegas residencies, and nearly 15,000 works in catalog. Active Miami, Ibiza, and 'Best of' compilations in 2025. Strong Beatport chart presence across house/tech-house. Open LabelRadar and DemoDrop submission channels.

name: Enormous Tunes
requirements: Submit via Google Form or LabelRadar | Private SoundCloud links when using email
why_it_belongs: Zürich-based house and progressive house label founded 2005. Home to Nora En Pure. Active 2025 releases ('The Yearbook 2025'). LabelRadar portal open. Strong Beatport and streaming credibility. Swiss label with global reach in melodic/progressive house.

name: SKINK Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Familiarize with Skink's sound and catalog before submitting
why_it_belongs: Showtek's 'hybrid label in dance music'. Active releases in 2025. Strong Beatport chart presence (bass house/house). Has official submit-demo page and confirmed email. Note: genre leans toward bass house — best fit for producers with energy-forward house and tech house.

name: Tomorrowland Music
requirements: Submit to Tomorrowland Academy (open demo portal) as entry point to Tomorrowland Music ecosystem
why_it_belongs: Official label of the world's most prestigious electronic music festival. Active 2025 releases on Beatport featuring Afrojack, R3HAB, Timmy Trumpet. Massive streaming credibility. Tomorrowland Academy sublabel accepts demos openly; main label appears to require existing relationships.

name: This Never Happened
genre_tags: melodic house; deep house; indie dance
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | No download links
why_it_belongs: Lane 8's own imprint — the definitive melodic/emotional deep house label from San Francisco. Strong Beatport presence, international touring brand, known for signing unknown artists who fit the emotional-melodic aesthetic. Demo email published publicly on labelsbase.

name: Sudbeat Music
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic techno; deep progressive
requirements: Use private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Hernan Cattaneo's flagship label — one of the most respected progressive house imprints globally. Consistently charts on Beatport, releases from GMJ, Franky Wah, and many emerging South American and international artists. Strong Beatport and streaming presence. Active through 2025.

name: Last Night On Earth
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic techno; deep house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links preferred
why_it_belongs: Sasha's own imprint, known for breaking artists like Cristoph, BAILE, John Monkman, dubspeeka, and Undercatt. Strong Beatport presence and scene credibility. Clearly accessible: demo email is publicly listed and multiple secondary sources corroborate it.

name: Selador Recordings
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic techno; deep house; techno
requirements: No specific format mandated but private SoundCloud links preferred | Receives hundreds of tracks daily — no guarantee of reply
why_it_belongs: Dave Seaman and Steve Parry's imprint launched 2013 — 'all colours of house and techno and those in-between.' Strong Beatport presence, radio show (Selador Sessions running through 2025), highly respected in progressive and melodic scenes. Explicitly accepts cold demos.

name: Bedrock Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Founded 1999 — one of the most storied progressive house labels. Active through 2025 with new releases (Bedrock Collection 2024/2025). Beatport Label of the Month Dec 2025. Consistently signs emerging talent alongside established names. Demo email publicly listed.

name: Stil vor Talent
genre_tags: melodic house; deep house; tech house; melodic techno
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | music@stilvortalent.de also listed as general music contact
why_it_belongs: 20-year-old Berlin label founded by Oliver Koletzki. Beatport Label of the Month July 2025. Packed release schedule through April 2026. Strong Beatport presence, booking agency, community hub. Accepts cold demos — dedicated demo@ email confirmed on official site.

name: Steyoyoke
genre_tags: melodic house; melodic techno; organic house; progressive house
requirements: Private SoundCloud playlist links ONLY | Music must be submitted EXCLUSIVELY to Steyoyoke — no simultaneous submissions to other labels or DJs | Select from: Steyoyoke, Steyoyoke Black, or Inner Symphony
why_it_belongs: Berlin label founded by Soul Button with three imprints (Steyoyoke, Steyoyoke Black, Inner Symphony). Active Beatport presence, dedicated submission form on own website — one of the most transparent submission processes in this slice. Releases melodic/organic and ethereal techno.

name: Einmusika Recordings
genre_tags: melodic house; melodic techno; progressive house; deep house
requirements: No download links with captcha — streaming or direct links only | Listen to label releases before submitting | Include brief artist background | Physical CDs can be mailed to Berlin office
why_it_belongs: Berlin label by producer Einmusik — active since 2008, consistently releasing on Beatport through 2025. Known for handpicking global talent (Solee, Apropos, shel·ly, Adina Nova). Dedicated demos page on own website with explicit submission instructions — transparent and cold-demo friendly.

name: Mango Alley
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic techno; organic house; downtempo
formats: LabelRadar upload; email with streaming link
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal or email demo link
why_it_belongs: Digital imprint established 2008, showcasing progressive house, melodic techno and organic house. Active LabelRadar portal (confirmed via LabelRadar profile) and direct demo email. Recent label showcase 2025. Based in Japan/international. Genre-perfect fit for the melodic slice.

name: Akbal Music
genre_tags: organic house; melodic house; deep house; afro house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2006 in Playa del Carmen, now Barcelona-based. Active releases through Feb 2025. Known for organic, afro-tinged and deep melodic house — strong fit for the organic/afro-downtempo subset of this slice. Has released Nick Curly, Audiofly, Afrilounge. Also has sub-label Akbal Music Editions.

name: Univack Records
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic techno; organic house; electronica
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Submit more than one or two finished tracks
why_it_belongs: Seville-based label focused on 'Wide Range Melodic Music: Techno, Prog techno, Emotive vibrations and (real) Prog-House Music.' Active through 2025–2026 on Beatport (266 progressive house tracks catalogued). Explicitly listens to all demos, 7-day turnaround policy. Accessible to unknowns.

name: microCastle
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic techno; deep progressive; electronica
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Toronto-based independent imprint since ~2008. Vinyl, cassette and digital releases. Active through 2024 (new release August 2024, RA profile active). Known for cutting-edge melodic progressive/electronica — borderless, artist-first ethos. Accessible via email.

name: Colorize (Enhanced)
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic house; deep house
requirements: Submit via Demmo platform | Music goes directly into Enhanced's official A&R workflow
why_it_belongs: Progressive/melodic sub-imprint of Enhanced Music. Very active in 2025 — Spring Sampler, Modera album, Falden EP, multiple Beatport chart entries. Part of a major independent label group with real A&R infrastructure. Has an active Demmo submission portal replacing old label-worx DemoBox.

name: Zerothree
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic house; melodic techno
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | Quarterly EP selection from unsigned artists via Wavo demo chart
why_it_belongs: UK progressive house imprint founded 2014. Very active in 2025 (Nihil Young, P.O.U., Diana Miro releases, Year Mix 2025). Unique open EP pipeline: releases quarterly EPs from unsigned artists handpicked from a Wavo demo chart. Excellent breakout vehicle for unknowns. Confirmed multiple submission routes.

name: Siamese
genre_tags: melodic techno; melodic house; deep house
key_people: Adriatique (Adrian Shala & Adrian Schweizer); Alex Knoblauch
why_it_belongs: Zürich-based label by Adriatique launched 2016 — one of the defining imprints of the melodic techno/house wave. Active 2025 (Beatport releases confirmed: Ajna/Samm 'Yours to Take' May 2025). Renowned Beatportal and RA credibility, booking impact through Adriatique's international profile. Accepts demo submissions.

name: Anjunabeats
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic house; trance; melodic techno
formats: LabelRadar upload; private SoundCloud link (email route)
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal (preferred) | Private SoundCloud links only if sending by email | Genre alignment critical — must fit the Anjuna sound
why_it_belongs: Major independent label by Above & Beyond — primary genre is trance/uplifting, but increasingly releases melodic house and progressive house that overlaps with this slice. Active LabelRadar portal. Booking impact is elite, streaming credibility is global. Worth targeting only if music has an Anjuna melodic-progressive feel.

name: Renaissance
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic house; electronica; techno
why_it_belongs: Legendary UK label founded 1992. Catalog and trademark acquired by Scott Rudmann in 2024 under new Renaissance Music company. Active releases into 2026 (confirmed on renaissance.dj — artists Khenya, Nichols+Roark, Jochem Hamerling). History of breaking emerging acts alongside established names. Strong credibility, Beatport presence, Apple Music catalog.

name: Innervisions
genre_tags: melodic house; deep house; melodic techno; electronica
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Dixon and Âme's Berlin imprint — one of the most respected and taste-making labels in melodic/emotional electronic music since 2005. Maintains Beatport presence and strong streaming and scene credibility. A demo email exists publicly, but the label's own 'About' describes a curated school-like approach — typically 6 releases/year, usually one per artist, relationship-driven. Cold demo acknowledged but success rate extremely low.

name: Afterlife
genre_tags: melodic techno; melodic house; cinematic techno
key_people: Tale Of Us (Matteo Milleri & Carmine Ferrara)
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Tale of Us label founded 2016 — arguably the defining melodic techno imprint of the last decade. Elite scene credibility, elite Beatport presence, massive booking and streaming impact. A demo email exists on labelsbase.net but the label receives thousands of weekly submissions and is widely understood to operate on a warm-intro/invitation basis for signings.

name: Kaluki Musik
genre_tags: tech house; house; deep house; techno
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: One of the UK's most respected underground house and tech-house brands with 25+ years of events and a label releasing consistently in 2025-2026, giving credible unknown artists a genuine pathway into the Manchester scene and beyond.

name: Filth on Acid
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Reinier Zonneveld's Amsterdam imprint is one of Europe's most credible peak-time techno/hard-techno labels with consistent Beatport chart presence and active 2024-2025 releases; a signing here immediately signals European club-circuit credibility.

name: Pets Recordings
requirements: Submit via contact page | Private SoundCloud playlist with downloadable tracks | No Facebook or SoundCloud DMs
why_it_belongs: A beloved European indie (Polish duo, globally respected) with a strong Wooded festival / Ibiza presence and 200+ catalogue releases; genuinely open to fresh talent and curates high-quality house through a simple contact-form process.

name: Stereo Productions
genre_tags: tech house; house; deep house; techno
requirements: Up to 5 tracks | Private SoundCloud links preferred
why_it_belongs: One of the most enduring Spanish indie imprints (est. 2000), the home of Iberican Sound with global distribution and Beatport chart history; uses Trackstack meaning submissions get a genuine listen and automated feedback.

name: La Pera Records
requirements: Up to 5 tracks | Private SoundCloud links if emailing
why_it_belongs: Barcelona-based tech house and techno label with nearly 300 releases, regular Ibiza presence, and a Trackstack portal indicating they actively process incoming demos — an unknown can realistically get a listen here.

name: elrow Music
requirements: Use private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: The label arm of the world-renowned elrow party brand with Amnesia Ibiza residencies and global events; a release here is immediately associated with top-tier clubbing credibility and Beatport chart impact.

name: Wow! Recordings
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Barcelona/Ibiza-based vinyl-and-digital tech house label with a boutique identity and curated roster; accessible directly by email making it a realistic target for an unknown with a polished sound.

name: Caballero Recordings
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Stuttgart-based European house indie active since 2004 with Traxsource and Beatport presence; known for quality underground house and consistent international club sound, accessible via dedicated demo email.

name: Klaphouse Records
genre_tags: tech house; deep tech; minimal; house
why_it_belongs: Prolific Milan-born tech house label (est. 2013) with 1800+ Beatport tracks, regular Miami and Amsterdam compilation series, and direct email access; volume and activity make it a realistic stepping-stone for unknown producers.

name: Origins Rcrds
why_it_belongs: Josh Butler's Sheffield-born imprint (10+ years) with a strong track record of breaking unknown talent alongside established names; active Beatport presence in 2024-2025 and a dedicated demo email make it genuinely accessible.

name: Terminal M
requirements: SoundCloud or Spotify streaming link | Include brief message about yourself
why_it_belongs: Monika Kruse's Berlin label (est. 2000) is one of Europe's most respected techno imprints with consistent Beatport chart presence and a dedicated demo email listed on the official website — giving unknown artists a credible direct route in.

name: Pacha Recordings
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: The official record label of the legendary Pacha Ibiza brand (est. 2006) with a globally recognised imprint, extensive Beatport and Traxsource catalogue, and a simple email demo submission process that remains publicly accessible.

name: Whippin Records
genre_tags: minimal deep tech; tech house; house
why_it_belongs: Mason Collective's UK minimal deep-tech label (est. 2019) was Beatportal's Hype Label of the Month (Dec 2024), has a roster of cutting-edge UK talent, and remains accessible to unknown artists with a matching underground sound.

name: Constant Sound
requirements: Private SoundCloud links preferred
why_it_belongs: London label (est. 2015) co-run by respected producer Burnski, releasing consistently through May 2026 with a deep underground sensibility; small enough that an unknown with genuine craft can realistically get signed.

name: Octopus Recordings
genre_tags: techno; tech house; minimal deep tech
requirements: Submit via SoundCloud dropbox
why_it_belongs: Sian's Dublin-founded, globally respected techno imprint (est. 2008) with a strong Beatport chart history and 100+ release catalogue; SoundCloud dropbox is an accessible, publicly known submission channel.

name: Lobster Theremin
genre_tags: house; techno; acid; outsider house; hard techno
why_it_belongs: London's most influential underground indie (est. 2013) with a distribution arm, shop, and tastemaker reputation; a release here is a career-defining stamp of credibility in the global underground.

name: Kompakt Records
genre_tags: house; minimal techno; deep house; microhouse
key_people: Wolfgang Voigt, Michael Mayer, Jürgen Paape
requirements: Send streaming links only (SoundCloud or similar) | Do not attach audio files | Label will respond only if interested
why_it_belongs: One of the few truly verified direct emails from the label's own official page. Cologne sound is specific — deep, minimal, melodic.

name: Trick
why_it_belongs: Patrick Topping specifically launched this as a platform for new talent. Great opportunity. He came up through Hot Creations himself.

name: Keinemusik
genre_tags: house; deep house; organic house; melodic techno
requirements: Send to drop@keinemusik.com for promos, demos, or other musical input
why_it_belongs: One of the most prestigious labels in the world. Do not send unless your production is at an elite level.

name: Fabric / Houndstooth
why_it_belongs: Rob Booth is one of the most knowledgeable A&Rs in electronic music. Run by the team behind fabric London.

name: VIVa MUSiC
genre_tags: house; tech house; deep house; techno
why_it_belongs: Steve Lawler is known as a real champion of new talent — artists like Jamie Jones, Simon Baker, and Davide Squillace all got early support here. High-value target.

name: Exploited Records
genre_tags: deep house; indie dance; house; disco house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Shir Khan broke Claptone, Adana Twins, Joyce Muniz. Berlin institution. Soulful, disco-influenced deep house is the sweet spot.

name: Pampa Records
why_it_belongs: DJ Koze released music with Damon Albarn in 2025. One of the most artistically respected labels in electronic music. Only approach if your music is genuinely unusual.

name: Tronic Music
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Include subject: Demo for Tronic
why_it_belongs: Founded in 1994, over 430 releases. Tronic Radio Show on 120+ stations = huge promotion opportunity for artists. Christian Smith still personally A&Rs.

name: Relief Records
genre_tags: house; tech house; jackin' house; chicago house
requirements: Send streaming/SoundCloud links only — no attachments
why_it_belongs: Green Velvet is a Chicago house legend. One email covers both Relief and Cajual. Raw, jacking Chicago energy is what they want.

name: Cajual Records
requirements: Send SoundCloud/streaming links only — no downloads | High volume; response times may be lengthy
why_it_belongs: One of Chicago's oldest house labels. Green Velvet created a house legacy here. Classic but still relevant. Same contact bruce@ covers both Cajual and Relief.

name: CR2 Records
requirements: private SoundCloud links only, no MP3 attachments | include contact details in email body
why_it_belongs: Mark Brown's Cr2 Show on Kiss FM. Good UK radio connections for signed artists.

name: Too Many Rules
requirements: Submit up to 5 tracks | 20-day review window | House / Deep House / Tech House focus | Label by Javi Bora
why_it_belongs: Javi Bora runs parties globally. Actively releases new artists. George Privatti (Elrow resident) releases here regularly. Very connected Spanish underground label.

name: Sanity Records
requirements: Use private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Cuartero is a respected Spanish underground artist with strong Ibiza connections. Accessible email, direct A&R contact.

name: Rawthentic Music
requirements: Listen to the label's releases before submitting
why_it_belongs: Carlo Lio confirmed in a 2025 interview they receive many demos and listen to all of them. Label is very active on Beatport — 10+ releases in 2025 alone. High output, high opportunity.

name: CUFF
requirements: Submit via Trackstack portal
why_it_belongs: Amine Edge & DANCE have a cult following. CUFF VA compilations are a great entry point — watch for 'This Is CUFF' VA calls. Raw attitude is non-negotiable.

name: Running Back
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Gerd Janson hosts an RA podcast and is constantly championing new artists. One of the most musically open-minded labels on this list.

name: Mother Recordings
requirements: SoundCloud dropbox or email contact | Berlin-based house/disco label (Nhan Solo)
why_it_belongs: Matt Tolfrey has been a consistent quality underground artist. Good mid-tier UK label with strong connections.

name: Circus Recordings
requirements: Must 'Like' Circus Recordings on Facebook first | Then complete web form on their site | High submission volume — be patient
why_it_belongs: Yousef runs Circus Liverpool which is one of the UK's longest-running club nights. Label artists get consistent club support. Carlo Lio and DJ Sneak have released here.

name: Resonance Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud link with download enabled | Subject line: [Your name] demo | Include short artist bio with past releases
why_it_belongs: Solid UK underground label. Consistent quality output. Good for new artists building a portfolio.

name: Fuse London
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Fuse at Egg London is legendary — Joy Orbison, Skream, Midland all played here. Label artists get direct club support. One of the best London underground labels.

name: Mobilee Records
genre_tags: house; tech house; minimal; deep house
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | Genres: Ambient, Downtempo, Deep House, Electro, Electronica, Nu Disco/Disco, Dark Disco, Melodic House
why_it_belongs: DUAL ROUTE: Email + LabelRadar. Annual Sonar Barcelona rooftop parties promote label artists globally. Pan-Pot, Rodriguez Jr., GHEIST all in the roster. Ralf Kollmann did a HÖR Berlin set in September 2025 — very active.

name: Desolat
requirements: Private SoundCloud links preferred | Artist name, track title, email required | Confirm rights to material
why_it_belongs: Loco Dice on demos: 'I love producers that deliver something in their style but fresh. You have to be real.' Portal is direct — submissions go straight to the team.

name: Scorpios Music
genre_tags: organic house; world electronic; deep house; afro house
why_it_belongs: Scorpios Mykonos is one of the world's most exclusive beach clubs. Keinemusik, Solomun, Black Coffee all perform here. Label artists get festival/event exposure automatically. For organic/world-influenced producers specifically.

name: Cercle Records
genre_tags: melodic techno; deep house; organic house; progressive
why_it_belongs: Cercle has 7M+ YouTube subscribers. A Cercle Records release gets millions of streams automatically. They curate artists for their iconic location-based livestreams — getting on the label is a pathway to being filmed for their streams.

name: Nite Grooves
genre_tags: deep house; soulful house; jackin' house
why_it_belongs: 30-year NYC institution. King Street Sounds sister label. For producers making soulful, deep, classic house music.

name: Chapter 24 Records
why_it_belongs: Growing label in the melodic/progressive space. Good target for melodic house and progressive techno producers.

name: Laut & Luise
genre_tags: organic house; afro house; world electronic; deep house
requirements: private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Growing organic/world electronic scene. Connected to the Scorpios Mykonos musical world. For producers blending organic sounds with electronic production.

name: Tuskegee Records
genre_tags: deep house; soulful house; jackin' house
why_it_belongs: Chicago underground roots. For producers making authentic, soul-rooted house music.

name: Phonica Records
requirements: Use private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Phonica is a Soho institution — every serious London DJ shops there. Getting on their label gives you shop exposure and DJ community credibility immediately.

name: Tamango Records
why_it_belongs: Spanish underground label with Ibiza connections. Good for producers targeting the Spanish club circuit.

name: Kling Klong Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: German underground label. Consistent quality output. Good for new artists building a release portfolio.

name: Solotoko
why_it_belongs: Sonny Fodera has released with MK, FISHER, and Chris Lake — the biggest names in house. Email confirmed from Facebook bio. Great opportunity for melodic house producers with commercial appeal.

name: Monoside Records
genre_tags: house; deep house; disco house; nu-disco
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Very prolific Italian label. Multiple releases per month. Great for funky, disco-influenced house producers. Good label for building a release portfolio.

name: Trace Amounts Records
why_it_belongs: Founded 2023 — still actively building their first proper roster. New labels take more risks on unknown artists than established ones. High priority for emerging producers.

name: 1trax
genre_tags: house; garage; deep house; uk bass
why_it_belongs: UK garage x house crossover is increasingly popular. Good for producers making UK-flavoured house with bassline influence.

name: Culprit
requirements: private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Long-running LA underground label. Desert Hearts, Dirtybird, Space Yacht orbit — good for producers in the US West Coast underground scene.

name: Global Underground
genre_tags: progressive house; deep house; techno; electronic
why_it_belongs: Global Underground has released mix CDs by Sasha, John Digweed, Danny Tenaglia — legends of electronic music. The label still carries enormous prestige. For progressive/deep producers with an artistic, journey-focused sound.

name: Moan Recordings
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Minimum 320kbps if file | Direct playable AND downloadable link
why_it_belongs: Spanish underground label with real scene credibility. Good for producers making groovy, minimal underground house.

name: Rose Avenue Records
genre_tags: melodic house; electronic; deep house; indie electronic
key_people: RÜFÜS DU SOL (Tyrone Lindqvist, Jon George, James Hunt)
why_it_belongs: RÜFÜS DU SOL are one of the biggest acts in melodic electronic music globally. Anyma — who is now everywhere — released on Rose Avenue. Colyn is a regular. If you make deeply emotional, artistic electronic music, this is a dream label. Very

name: Up The Stuss
genre_tags: house; deep house; tech house; minimal
why_it_belongs: Chris Stussy's 'Desire' has 39M+ Spotify streams. He had a BBC Radio 1 residency in April 2025. Debut album out in 2026. One of the fastest-rising names in underground house. Management email confirmed from his own website.

name: Drumma Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: French underground house scene. Good for producers targeting the European club circuit. Consistent output, accessible entry point.

name: Rutilance Recordings
why_it_belongs: Chris Stussy is a regular here. Connected to the Amsterdam underground scene alongside Fuse London and PIV. Good for producers making warm, sophisticated deep house.

name: What NXT
requirements: House music submissions
why_it_belongs: Rich NXT is an active UK underground producer and DJ. Good entry into the UK underground circuit for up-and-coming artists.

name: Kaoz Theory
why_it_belongs: Chris Stussy releases here alongside Fuse London and PIV. Growing UK underground house label. Good for producers building an international release history.

name: Correspondant
why_it_belongs: Paris has one of the most vibrant underground scenes in Europe. Correspondant is respected for its elegant, thoughtful curation.

name: Hivern Discs
genre_tags: house; minimal; indie dance; deep house
why_it_belongs: John Talabot is a cult figure in Barcelona and global electronic music. Very few releases per year but each one is significant. For producers making genuinely artistic, unconventional electronic music.

name: Compost Records
why_it_belongs: Âme and Dixon (Innervisions founders) released early music on Compost. 30+ year institution. For producers making jazz-influenced, deep, and eclectic electronic music.

name: 20/20 Vision
requirements: Submit via contact form on 2020recordings.com/contact
why_it_belongs: Ralph Lawson also runs Basics Leeds — one of the UK's most legendary club nights alongside Haçienda. Artists signed get club support at Basics. 30+ year institution in UK deep house.

name: Pressure Traxx
genre_tags: house; chicago house; jackin' house; garage
why_it_belongs: 30-year Chicago house institution. Roy Davis Jr. is a real pioneer. For producers with deep knowledge of and respect for Chicago house roots. Real authenticity required.

name: Simulate Recordings
genre_tags: melodic techno; melodic house; progressive techno
why_it_belongs: Massano is one of the most talked-about melodic techno artists right now. CamelPhat, Anyma, and Argy have all released on Simulate. Very active label — multiple releases per month. Demo form confirmed on their official website.

name: Ellum Audio
requirements: Use private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Maceo Plex (Eric Estornel) is one of electronic music's most versatile artists — Maetrik, Mariel Ito aliases. Ellum is approaching 50 releases. If you make music with genuine depth and eclecticism, this is a perfect target. Email confirmed

name: Mindshake Records
why_it_belongs: Paco Osuna is DC-10 Ibiza resident. His Music On parties at Amnesia Ibiza are legendary. Mindshake has released Carlo Lio and Egbert — respected names. Trackstack portal confirmed from their own listing.

name: Noir Music
genre_tags: deep house; melodic techno; techno; progressive
requirements: Two submission channels available: email demo@noir-music.com or LabelRadar portal | LabelRadar accepts: Deep House, Techno, Ambient
why_it_belongs: Gregor Tresher and Nick Curly have released on Noir. Noir's productions are sophisticated and cinematic. Good for producers making dark, deep, melodic electronic with strong artistic vision.

name: Of Unsound Mind
why_it_belongs: Skream is one of UK dance music's most respected figures — UK garage to dubstep to house to techno. Of Unsound Mind is entirely personal. Getting on here means Skream genuinely loves your music.

name: DeepClass Records
why_it_belongs: Good Barcelona entry point for deep and tech house producers. Active demo portal with clear submission process.

name: Stil vor Talent — Light My Fire
requirements: Use private SoundCloud links only | This address covers Stil vor Talent main label; Light My Fire is an SVT sub-division
why_it_belongs: Light My Fire was reignited from dormancy in 2025. 'Electronic music that speaks volumes, with an international impact and focus on the dancefloor.' One email to SVT covers both main label and Light My Fire.

name: Rebirth Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Len Faki is a Berghain resident DJ — one of the most respected names in techno. Rebirth has connections across the Dutch and German underground techno scene.

name: Noir sur Blanc Records
requirements: Submit via form on demos page
why_it_belongs: Elegant French deep house label. Good for producers making refined, artistic deep house with a European sensibility.

name: HoTL Records
requirements: Original music only (no bootlegs, mash-ups, promos) | Demo must be offered exclusively to HoTL Records
why_it_belongs: Active independent label with clear demo process. Good for producers building initial release history.

name: Ritter Butzke Studio
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Ritter Butzke is one of Berlin's favourite underground clubs. The label reflects the club's musical identity. Artists on the label get exposure at one of Berlin's best venues.

name: Adesso Music
why_it_belongs: Ferreck Dawn has released on Defected, Hot Creations, and Toolroom. Adesso is his home label. Good Italian underground entry point.

name: Skint Records
genre_tags: house; electro house; big beat; electronic
requirements: Submit to skint.demos@bmg.com | BMG-owned label since 2014 | Brighton-based dance/electronic label
why_it_belongs: Fatboy Slim's original label. 30 years of British electronic music. Still active and eclectic. Good for producers making distinctive, British-spirited electronic music.

name: Agile Recordings
requirements: Use private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Swedish underground label. Good for accessing the Scandinavian club circuit. Consistent quality output.

name: Loot Recordings
requirements: Private SoundCloud link with brief artist bio | No attachments or downloads
why_it_belongs: Good UK independent for groovy, soulful house producers. Consistent output, accessible submission process.

name: MK837
requirements: unreleased tracks only (no prior commercial release, free downloads, or streaming) | private links only | genres: house, tech house, deep house, progressive house, minimal/deep tech, techno
why_it_belongs: GREAT FOR NEW ARTISTS: MK837 explicitly says they want new faces and have 'a long history of working with new artists and helping them establish themselves over time.' Active demo form. They also ask you to support labelmates — genuine comm

name: Strictly Rhythm
requirements: Submit via the on-site demos form (artist name, email, private SoundCloud link)
why_it_belongs: Legendary NYC house institution since 1989 — and it runs a live demo form, so it's reachable.

name: Kittball Records
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal, the on-site demo form, or the demo email
why_it_belongs: Tube & Berger's German tech house label — consistent Beatport presence and demo-friendly.

name: Lone Romantic
why_it_belongs: Maceo Plex's melodic/organic label — 'beautifully organized noise', strong scene pull.

name: Do Not Sleep
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Darius Syrossian's tech house brand (label + Ibiza party) — credible underground platform.

name: Ovum Recordings
requirements: Submit via the official site's 'Submit a Demo' | Postal A&R also accepted: Ovum Recordings, 611 S. 4th St, Philadelphia, PA 19147, Attn: A&R
why_it_belongs: Josh Wink's seminal Philadelphia label (since 1994) — deep house/techno heritage and respect.

name: 8Bit Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: German house/tech house label with steady output and an open demo door.

name: Suol
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Respected Berlin deep/soulful house label with a strong, distinctive catalogue.

name: Katermukke
genre_tags: melodic house; organic house; tech house
requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why_it_belongs: Berlin melodic/organic house label with broad reach and a steady release schedule.

name: 3000 Grad Records
requirements: 3 tracks minimum, with downloads enabled
why_it_belongs: North-German organic/melodic house label and crew — a recognised home for the outdoor/organic sound.

name: Time Is Now
requirements: Submit via the label's online form (linked from socials)
why_it_belongs: Leading UKG / garage-house label (Shall Not Fade family) — a key route in the UK garage revival.

name: Natura Viva
why_it_belongs: Italian house/tech house label (since 2010) that openly welcomes demos.

name: Lapsus Music
requirements: Private SoundCloud link with download enabled | Include Spotify artist page link | Specify which label you are sending demo for
why_it_belongs: Barcelona tech/house label with consistent output and a clear submission route.

name: Só Track Boa
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Major Brazilian tech house brand (Vintage Culture's circle) — huge reach in the LATAM scene.

name: Warung Recordings
genre_tags: melodic house; tech house; organic house
requirements: Submit via the Trackstack portal (or the demo email)
why_it_belongs: Warung Beach Club's label (Brazil, since 2012) — a globally respected melodic/organic platform.

name: Apparel Music
genre_tags: deep house; jazzy house; house; nu-disco
why_it_belongs: Milan-based independent label founded in 2009 by Kisk; pioneered the jazz-meets-deep-house sound. Over 15 years of releases with genuine global distribution (Beatport, Traxsource). Released 15th anniversary compilation in Aug 2025 featuring artists from Italy, USA, Australia, Spain and Germany. Plausible career launchpad for an unknown with a soulful, jazz-inflected sound.

name: Jackies Music Records
why_it_belongs: Independent Barcelona house label launched June 2023 with 34+ releases to date. Closely linked to the Off Sónar ecosystem – released an Off Barcelona 2025 Sampler. Has signed Moon Boots, Piero Pirupa, DJ Lora and Keys N Krates, demonstrating real curator credibility. Young label hungry for new talent in the Barcelona house scene.

name: Sincopat
genre_tags: tech house; deep house; progressive house; electronica
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Valencia, Spain-based label founded 2010 by AFFKT; widely regarded as one of Spain's finest avant-garde electronic imprints with 100+ releases. Active in 2025 with seasonal compilations (Day / Night collections). Has collaborated with LabelRadar for remix contests indicating openness to unknown talent. Strong Beatport/Traxsource presence. Can genuinely shift a career for an artist in the experimental tech-house space.

name: Pornostar Records
genre_tags: funky house; nu-disco; afro house; jackin house; house
requirements: SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Spain-based (Barcelona-affiliated) house label ranked #1 Funky House label on BeatStats with 410,708+ points. Releases weekly across Beatport and Traxsource covering Funky House, Nu Disco, Tribal and Afro House. Roster includes Block & Crown, Crazibiza, Nicola Fasano. Released annual 'Funky House Annual 2025' and 'Funky House Annual 2026' compilations showing consistent output. High viability for funky/jackin-house adjacent demos.

name: Mood Funk Records
genre_tags: jackin house; funky house; house; tech house
why_it_belongs: Italian (Sicily) house label founded by Angelo Ferreri; focuses on Funky-Tech-House with 600+ artist roster and global DJ support (Carl Cox, Roger Sanchez et al.). Actively releasing in 2025 with tracks by Joaquin Phunk, Hiva, Diego Serrao. Has a dedicated submission form on official website plus email. Established enough to give unknown artists real dancefloor exposure.

name: Hell Yeah Recordings
genre_tags: balearic house; nu-disco; minimal; tech house; electronica
why_it_belongs: Italian label (Ferrara) founded 2006 by Marco 'peeDoo' Gallerani; descended from Mantra Vibes, one of Italy's leading dance labels. Active releases in 2025 including 'File Under Balearic Gabba Vol 2' (March 2025) and 'Recess EP' by Johan Blende (December 2025). Known for eclectic Balearic, modern-disco-ish sound. Featured in Juno Daily label focus March 2025. A real launchpad for artists with a Balearic/disco-house sensibility.

name: Polifonic Records
genre_tags: house; melodic house; electronica; organic house
why_it_belongs: Puglia (Itria Valley), Italy-based label born from the acclaimed annual Polifonic festival (since 2017). Label launched 2021 and released 9 titles including vinyl. Active in 2025 with 'Magnolia EP' by Damiano Von Erckert (July 2025). Releases span house, acid and electronica with a strong Puglian/Italian identity. The festival connection gives signed artists rare event placement and press opportunities.

name: Memento Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Italian label (Mantua/Bologna area) founded 2006 by Algerian-Italian DJ Idriss D; 56+ catalog numbers with releases through September 2024 (EP Memento052). Operates from the fertile Pianura Padana music region. Known for discovering local Italian talent. Active in the minimal/deep house space, respected within the European underground circuit.

name: Be One Records
genre_tags: tech house; minimal; house; afro house
why_it_belongs: Spain-based (Granada/Barcelona) label run by producer-DJ Ruiz dB. Active on Beatport and Traxsource with a 'Best of 2024' compilation released. Focuses on tech house, minimal and afro house. Has a dedicated demos page and email. Entry-level label within the Spanish underground scene that can provide a release credit and distribution footprint for an unknown artist.

name: Prospect Records
genre_tags: tech house; techno; deep house; minimal
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Naples, Italy-based label founded 2011 by respected Italian DJ/producer Hollen; releases span tech house, minimal and techno. Demonstrably active in 2024-2025 with Hollen 'Feel Alive' (Jan 2024), 'Just Be' (Oct 2024), and 'Night Trip' (Jan 2025). Has a public domain email for demos. Italian underground credibility with Beatport and Traxsource distribution. Can launch an unknown artist in the Italian/European tech house circuit.

name: Poker Flat Recordings
genre_tags: deep house; minimal; tech house; house
requirements: Private streaming link only — no download links, no public links | No feedback guaranteed if material does not fit
why_it_belongs: Steve Bug's 25-year Berlin institution; one of Germany's most respected underground house / minimal labels, artists like Sebo K, Isolée and Huxley came through here. Has a direct demo email on the official site, 2024–2025 active with Best Of 2024 compilation and new collabs in May 2025.

name: Sublease Music
genre_tags: deep house; minimal; tech house; house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links preferred
why_it_belongs: Poker Flat's sub-label for 'reduced, hypnotic, raw' club cuts; explicitly created to break new talent alongside Poker Flat main roster. Active: Sublease Music Vol.04 Dec 2024, Vol.05 2025, Steve Bug & Hervé Solar 'Lift Off' March 2025. Has its own dedicated demo email separate from Poker Flat.

name: Upon.You Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Respected Berlin institution (est. 2007) run by Marco Resmann and Hawks Grunert; launched Cari Golden, Luna City Express, HYPOXIA LDN and many others. Active December 2024 (Algorithm Anniversary Mix with Cari Golden) and June 2025 (Dance Ma Sense Cocolino Remix). Consistent quality bar for underground Berlin tech house/minimal.

name: Great Stuff Recordings
genre_tags: tech house; house; minimal / deep tech
why_it_belongs: Munich-based label est. 2003, part of Housesession label group; one of Germany's highest-volume tech house labels (1400+ Beatport tracks). Active across 2024–2025 with Amsterdam 2024 compilation, 'Gems of 2025' VA, and Summer Anthems 2025 Vol.2. Official Trackstack portal confirmed from their own Facebook post.

name: Parquet Recordings
genre_tags: deep house; melodic house; tech house; progressive house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Solee's German label est. 2006; 200+ releases, Beatport 'Label of the Month', regular Beatport Progressive/Deep House Top 10s. Active February 2025 (AYU - Reach the Sky release) and returning 2025 with stated new direction into melodic house & techno. Accessible to unknown artists through direct demo email listed on labelsbase.

name: Uncanny Valley
genre_tags: house; minimal; deep house; acid house; funk
requirements: Send SoundCloud link to info@uncannyvalley.de | Be patient — team has limited time due to other employment
why_it_belongs: Dresden label est. 2010; grown from a friends collective to a respected international underground network with 100+ releases. Active May 2025 ('Put The Funk Back In 2 Techno'), March 2025 ('14 Years of Uncanny Valley' comp), Feb 2025 ('La Bomba'). Honest, accessible submission policy.

name: Cécille Records
genre_tags: tech house; minimal; deep house; house
requirements: Navigate to DEMO SUBMISSION section on official website cecille-records.de
why_it_belongs: Mannheim label est. 2008; defined the 'Mannheim Sound' with Nick Curly, Leon, Sidney Charles, Reboot. Active 2024–2025 (Reboot 'Red House' EP, Leyo debut album, Fleur Shore first vinyl, Cécille Summer 2025 Compilation, CECSEASON003 July 2025). Official site has dedicated Demo Submission page in navigation.

name: Moonbootique Records
genre_tags: house; electro house; tech house; melodic house
requirements: Streaming links only — no MP3 attachments
why_it_belongs: Hamburg label est. 2001 by Moonbootica; one of Germany's longest-running independent house imprints. Active 2024–2025: 'Can't Stop Me' April 2025, 'Burning' December 2025, releases in 2026 confirmed. Artists include Township Rebellion, Ante Perry, Julian Wassermann, David Hasert. Submission email confirmed via multiple sources.

name: LOSSLESS
why_it_belongs: Berlin label est. 2014 run by Mathias Schober and Thomas Herb; known for elegant modern deep house with roster including Frankey & Sandrino, Manuel Tur, Love over Entropy, David Kochs. Active 2024–2025: catalog at LL1237/LL1238 (Jepe 'Sunny/Fantasia', Soudant 'Futility EP'). Boutique scale where a signed track has genuine scene impact.

name: Snork Enterprises
genre_tags: minimal; tech house; minimal / deep tech
why_it_belongs: Hamburg label est. 2004 run by Christian Schachta; niche underground imprint with loyal following for atmospheric minimal-techhouse. Active July 2024 (Luis Luchetti 'Siqy', Chris Baumann 'State of Flux') and Feb 2025 (vinyl session at BaalSaal Hamburg). No public demo inbox — label is curated by owner personally.

name: Public Possession
genre_tags: house; disco; deep house; indie dance
why_it_belongs: Munich label est. 2013 run by Valentino Betz and Marvin Schuhmann; internationally regarded for its eclectic house, disco and world-music-influenced releases. Event at Haus der Kunst May 2024; active releases ongoing. Boutique output where each release carries significant press and scene impact. No open demo inbox — relationship-driven.

name: Boogie Angst
genre_tags: nu-disco; indie dance; deep house; funk
why_it_belongs: Netherlands label (Amsterdam area) with strong Kraak & Smaak and Fouk connection; known for nu-disco, funk-influenced electronic dance releases. Active 2024–2025: Edition Four March 2024, 'Heat' March 2025, 'Nothing Is Forever' July 2025, Moods 'Wildfire' Nov 2025. Good entry point for disco-house / nu-disco crossover material.

name: Unknown To The Unknown (UTTU)
genre_tags: deep house; UK bass; house; breaks; garage; jungle
sub_labels: Hot Haus Recs; Pre Rolled Joints
why_it_belongs: Seminal UK underground electronic label run by DJ Haus. Launched careers of Mall Grab, DJ Boring, VTSS and others. Sits at the intersection of UK bass, house, garage and breaks — a career-making imprint for an unknown artist breaking from the underground.

name: Hot Haus Recs
genre_tags: house; UK bass; bassline; deep house; bass house
why_it_belongs: Sister label to UTTU focused on rawer house, bass and UK-influenced sounds. Active with releases in 2024-2025 including John Heaven 'Ow' (Mar 2025), lau.ra 'Vibe' (Dec 2024), Frazer Ray & BRUX (Mar 2025). Has broken multiple unknown artists into the UK underground circuit.

name: Banoffee Pies Records
genre_tags: deep house; lo-fi house; bass; electronica; experimental house
why_it_belongs: Bristol-born, now Berlin-based multi-medium label founded 2014 by Ell Weston. Distributed by !K7. Home to Ciel, D. Tiffany, Pugilist, Xades and others. One of the most respected underground deep/lo-fi labels in the UK-global circuit. Active Feb 2025 (Xades 'Vapour', BP027D).

name: Edible Records
genre_tags: house; tech house; disco house; bass house
requirements: Use official Bandcamp contact form
why_it_belongs: Bristol-based label co-founded by Eats Everything and former NRK boss Nick Harris (2015). Releases from Lord Leopard, Mele, Seb Zito, Waze & Odyssey, Illyus & Barrientos, Tony Romera 'La Police' (Jul 2025). One of the most profile-raising house labels in the UK.

name: Futureboogie Recordings
requirements: Contact via Bandcamp form or Instagram @futureboogierecordings
why_it_belongs: Bristol-based agency and club night turned label. Released Julio Bashmore's debut and consistently champions quality deep/disco house. Active through Jan 2025 (Enzio Etchaberri, release #144). Respected imprint that can meaningfully expose an unknown UK artist.

name: Warehouse Music
genre_tags: tech house; UK minimal; house; bassline
why_it_belongs: London-based imprint by Mella Dee, one of the UK's most respected underground tech house/UK minimal producers. WM001-WM024+ releases; roster includes Spencer Parker, L-Vis 1990, Joshua James, BLACK GIRL/WHITE GIRL. UK Minimal Vol. 1 & 2 (Oct-Dec 2025) confirms very strong activity.

name: ec2a
genre_tags: UK bass; tech house; house; bassline; UK garage-adjacent club
requirements: Use Bandcamp contact form or reach via Instagram @ec2a_
why_it_belongs: London underground label operated by Dr Dubplate with tagline 'Making way for the new wave.' Rinse FM bi-monthly residency. Releases INVT, Soul Mass Transit System and others. UK bass/house crossover. Active 2024 with DJ Mag Vital Label feature and Corsica Studios event.

name: E-Beamz
why_it_belongs: UK South Coast label (est. 2016) co-founded by DJ Haus and Mat Unearthed. Launched DJ Boring's career with 'Winona'. Roster: DJ Boring, DJ Seinfeld, Hugo Massien, Settle Down, Tommy The Cat, Lake Haze. Last original releases 2023; 2024 activity was vinyl repress only. Included for historical weight; verify activity before submitting.

name: 2 B REAL
genre_tags: UK club; bass house; experimental house; UK garage adjacent; freaky club
requirements: Contact via Bandcamp form or reach Finn via social media
why_it_belongs: Manchester-based experimental club label run by Finn and Local Action. Roster: Anz, Gage, Clemency, Iceboy Violet, Martyn Bootyspoon, aya. Cutting-edge UK bass-house crossover with DJ Mag coverage. Active Feb 2025 (Dismal House II: Dismal Inferno). North-West UK perspective.

name: Product London Records
requirements: Submit via web form at productlondon.com/send-us-demos/ | Use private SoundCloud links — no download links | Listen to back catalogue first to confirm genre fit | Demos reviewed once per week — no reply means not a fit
