why_it_belongs: London-based label with a transparent, artist-friendly cold-submission process. Explicitly accepts all demos via web form, reviews weekly, and states all submitted demos are heard. Focused on house and techno. Active on Beatport with a growing catalog. Excellent entry-point for unknown UK producers.

name: Hessle Audio
genre_tags: deep house; UK bass; leftfield house; techno adjacent; experimental club
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Highly prestigious London/Leeds label (est. 2007) run by Ben UFO, Pearson Sound and Pangaea. Roster: Anz, Pangaea, Pearson Sound, Jasmín. Active with Pearson Sound 'Which Way Is Up' EP (Oct 2024). One of the most tastemaker-defining labels in UK underground dance — a career-defining placement.

name: Pacific Rhythm
genre_tags: deep house; lo-fi house; organic house; electronica
requirements: Contact via website (pacificrhythm.org) or Bandcamp contact form
why_it_belongs: Vancouver-based label (est. 2013) with strong UK/European following and tastemaker status. Active with 10th anniversary sampler (Mar 2025) featuring LNRDCROY, Khotin, Active Surplus. Roster: D. Tiffany, Space Ghost, Flørist. Highly relevant for UK deep/lo-fi house producers seeking global placement. Investigated per slice instructions.

name: Innate Recordings
genre_tags: deep house; deep electronic; organic house
requirements: Contact via Bandcamp form or Instagram @inn8media
why_it_belongs: Bristol-based deep electronic label (est. 2018) with a focused, quality-first catalog. Active with Innate 007 (Oct 2024) and upcoming Connective Zone 'Palm Palm' remaster (May 2025). Distributed by Juno. Specialises in 'deep electronic music with warmth and soul.' Excellent match for unknown UK deep house artists.

name: Lost Palms
requirements: Use the Shall Not Fade Google Form — explicitly selects Lost Palms as a target label | Provide artist name and Instagram handle | Submit private SoundCloud playlist with as many tracks as possible | List previous label release history
why_it_belongs: Sub-label of Shall Not Fade (also in DB) focused on deeper, dustier house cuts. Roster: DJ Boring, Dylan Dylan, Alex Virgo, Subjoi, Justin Jay, Harrison BDP. Active through 2026. The demo form covers Lost Palms explicitly. A direct way to access the Shall Not Fade ecosystem for deeper house output.

name: Maya Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Up to 5 tracks via Trackstack
why_it_belongs: NYC-based house institution founded in 2000 by Joeski. Active through 2026 with confirmed releases: 'Chainless' (Jan 2026), 'Music Is Everything' (Feb 2026), 'Take You Higher' (Mar 2025), 'Spanglish' (Dec 2024), 'Aliens On Earth' (Apr 2024). Respected indie that breaks unknown artists within the New York/US underground house circuit. Two confirmed demo channels: Trackstack portal and direct email.

name: Guesthouse Music
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Oakland, CA-based underground house label founded 2004. One of the US West Coast's premier independently distributed house imprints with 300+ vinyl/digital releases and 200+ artist roster. Released 'Best of 2024' and 'Best of 2025' compilations confirming active status. Anniversary party April 2025. DJ Mes is widely credited with keeping West Coast jackin' house alive.

name: Trax Records
genre_tags: house; deep house; classic house; jackin house
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal or email | Streaming/SoundCloud links preferred
why_it_belongs: The original home of house music, Chicago, est. 1985. Active 40th anniversary in 2025 with new vinyl (RISING AGAIN, 500-copy limited edition) and digital releases, pairing legends (Frankie Knuckles, Marshall Jefferson) with contemporary artists (Hiroko Yamamura, Analog 87, Jacques x Gregory). Accepting demos via both LabelRadar and direct email. A release on Trax is one of the most historically significant stamps a US house producer can earn.

name: DJ International Records
requirements: Submit via Trackstack portal
why_it_belongs: Chicago's legendary founding house label, est. 1985 — home to Frankie Knuckles, Steve Silk Hurley, Farley Jackmaster Funk, Marshall Jefferson. Relaunched 2021 under Last Man Music with Rocky Jones. Actively releasing with catalog on Beatport and historical significance second only to Trax Records in the Chicago house pantheon. A release here carries enormous cultural weight and credibility.

name: My Favorite Robot Records
key_people: Jared Simms; Voytek Korab; James Teej
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Toronto, Canada-based tech house / deep house imprint founded 2008 by duo My Favorite Robot (Jared Simms + Voytek Korab). Active 2024-2025 on Beatport with 208 tech house releases, 252 deep house releases. One of Canada's leading underground tech-house imprints with real credibility in North American and European markets.

name: Interstellar Recordings (Insomniac)
genre_tags: melodic house; progressive house; deep house; melodic techno
requirements: Up to 5 tracks via Label Engine form | Artist name, email, and track titles required | Optional social links and 500-char artist message
why_it_belongs: Los Angeles-based imprint under Insomniac Music Group, launched March 2024 as a sanctuary for melodic house, progressive house, deep house and melodic techno. First release by Jeremy Olander. Active 2024-2026 on Beatport with Marsh, Alex Kennon, Just Her, Eynka, Layla Benitez. Insomniac's scale means excellent distribution, sync, and event placement. The Label Engine form is a confirmed open submission portal.

name: Wolf + Lamb Records
genre_tags: deep house; house; indie dance; nu-disco
key_people: Zev Eisenberg (Wolf); Gadi Mizrahi (Lamb / Baby Prince)
requirements: Contact via Bandcamp 'Contact Wolf + Lamb Records' email link | No public demo process — DM or industry intro preferred
sub_labels: Double Standard Records; Crew Love Records
why_it_belongs: Brooklyn, NY label founded ~2005. Home to Lorenzo Dada, No Regular Play, Nick Monaco, PillowTalk. Active through early 2024 with release 'Lost In This Moment' (Aug 2023) and re-release on Bleep (Mar 2024). The Brooklyn underground deep house sound they pioneered remains highly influential and is a clear trajectory-changer. No open demo portal — relationship-driven access but worth including for its brand power.

name: Double Standard Records
requirements: Contact via Bandcamp 'Send an email to Double Standard Records' link
why_it_belongs: Brooklyn/NYC deep house label founded 2010 by Gadi Mizrahi (Baby Prince), off-shoot of Wolf + Lamb. Houses the Wolf + Lamb movement's funkier, deep-house-forward output, with artists like Soul Clap, Greg Paulus and Edwin Esco. Active with Bandcamp presence and Beatport catalog. Part of the Crew Love coalition. NYC deep house touchstone label.

name: Crew Love Records
genre_tags: deep house; house; indie dance; nu-disco
key_people: Wolf + Lamb; Soul Clap; Baby Prince (Gadi Mizrahi)
requirements: No public demo channel — target via affiliated labels (Soul Clap: records@soulclap.us) or DM artists on social media
why_it_belongs: Brooklyn-based collaborative label from Wolf + Lamb, Soul Clap, and Double Standard. Active 2022-2026 on Beatport spanning deep house, house, indie dance, nu-disco. Artists: No Regular Play, PillowTalk, Nick Monaco, Life on Planets, Navid Izadi, Slow Hands. A curated, quality-first imprint that is part of the NYC deep house ecosystem. Access is through the Wolf + Lamb / Soul Clap artist network.

name: Turbo Recordings
genre_tags: tech house; house; indie dance; electronica
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Montreal, Canada imprint founded 1998 by Tiga, named Beatport Label of the Month August 2024. Active through 2024-2025 with releases: Dense & Pika 'It House' (Nov 2024), Extrawelt 'Grindmaster' (Dec 2024), Kenny Glasgow (Jan 2025). A prestigious Canadian label with real industry clout across tech house, indie dance, and experimental electronic music. Confirmed public demo email.

name: Phunk Junk Records
requirements: Up to 5 tracks via Label Engine form | Artist name, email, and track titles required
why_it_belongs: Chicago-based label founded 2012 by producer SALADIN. Active 2024-2025 with releases including 'Get On The Floor' (Jun 2024, Tech House) and 'Dance With Me' (Jan 2025, Bass House) on Beatport. A platform rooted in the birthplace of house music, Chicago, with open and confirmed demo submission. A real opportunity for an unknown artist to get heard by a home-grown Chicago label.

name: Rawhouse Records Chicago
genre_tags: house; deep house; chicago house; afro house; nu-disco
requirements: Contact via Bandcamp 'Contact Rawhouse Records Chicago' email link
why_it_belongs: Chicago house label founded 2005 by Allen Wright Jr. Specializes in Chicago House, Deep House, Disco House, Nu Disco, Afro-House. Active through 2025 with confirmed releases: Jeanette Thomas 'Good Vibrations' (March 2025), MISS. TC release (July 2024). A genuine Chicago underground imprint with multiple sub-styles and Traxsource/Beatport presence. A grassroots label that can launch an unknown artist into the Chicago house scene.

name: Soul Candi Records
genre_tags: afro house; deep house; tech house; afro tech
requirements: Original unreleased material only | No remixes or bootlegs | MP3 320kbps preferred, max 20MB per file | Upload via official website form only (no SoundCloud or Dropbox links) | Filename must include artist name and track title
why_it_belongs: South Africa's longest-running dedicated house imprint (est. late 1990s), consistently releasing deep house, afro house and afro tech. Active releases confirmed through 2024 and 2025 (multiple Bandcamp releases: 'The Chronic Effect' Nov 2025, 'House Archives Vol.1' Sept 2025). Open public demo submission form on official website with clear requirements.

name: Kunye Records
requirements: Afro House / Afro Tech only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2020 by Shimza (South Africa). Beatport Hype Label of the Month October 2024. Bridges South African emerging producers to global stages. Roster includes Thakzin, Blanka Mazimela, Darque, with remixes by Louie Vega, Mele, Rodriguez Jr. Has official LabelRadar demo portal and a general contact email.

name: Make The Girls Dance Records
genre_tags: afro house; tribal house; house; latin
why_it_belongs: Founded 2021 by HUGEL and Juany Bravo. Ranked #2 top-selling Afro House label on Beatport in 2024. Rooted in Tribal and Afro House, Latin grooves, and club culture. Trackstack demo box URL publicly posted on Threads by label manager Juany Bravo. Also has a LabelRadar portal.

name: Dawn Patrol Records
genre_tags: afro house; melodic house; organic house
requirements: Melodic house, organic house, or melodic techno preferred | Label is NOT looking for pure afro house singles
why_it_belongs: Founded 2020 by Brazilian duo Maz and Antdot. Top-5 best-selling Afro House label on Beatport in 2023 and 2024. 'Povoada' reached #1 on Beatport Afro House chart. Active release 'Emoriô' in October 2024. Official contact form on website. Label explicitly states preferred genres via Instagram @dawnpatrol.music.

name: Afrocentric Records
requirements: Send private streaming links (MP3) | Include contact details in email body | Keep submission short, best tracks first
why_it_belongs: Founded 2015 by Cory Centric, dedicated exclusively to high-quality Afro House from across the African continent. Active 2024 releases confirmed (RAWNIK 'AMAZWI', Kates Le Cafe). Demo email published directly on the label's official contact page.

name: Cafe De Anatolia
genre_tags: organic house; afro house; ethnic deep house; world music
key_people: Monika Ilieva; Rialians On Earth (Nikola Iliev); Billy Esteban (Zoran Iliev)
requirements: Organic house / ethnic deep house / afro house / world music genres only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2017, North Macedonia. #1 best-selling label and artist in Organic/Ethnic House on Beatport in 2024. Nominated IMS Ibiza Beatport Hype Label of Year 2024. 10,000+ track catalog with 5,000+ artists across 50+ sub-brands including Afro House. Massive breakout vehicle for unknown artists. LabelRadar portal and email both verified.

name: Nulu Music
genre_tags: afro house; afro tech; deep house
requirements: Afro house and afro tech only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2009 in New York by Anane Vega, pioneer of Afro House and Afro Tech. 'You're So Sweet' remix ranked #1 on Traxsource Afro House. Active 2024-2025 releases confirmed (Dec 2024, Nov 2024). Also runs the NULU Movement Radio Show on KayaFM (South Africa). Demo email verified on official contact page.

name: CamelMusic Records
requirements: Tech house and house genres only | Submit private SoundCloud links | Include artist name and email address in the form
why_it_belongs: Founded 2012, Mendoza, Argentina. Independent Argentine underground label dedicated to house, tech house and minimal. Active 2025 release confirmed (Jan 2025 on Beatport, May 2026 on LabelsBase). Tally.so demo submission form personally verified as live and functioning.

name: Kazukuta Records
requirements: Afro house only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2011, Angola — the first electronic music label born in Angola. 266 Afro House tracks on Beatport. Active releases Dec 2024 and Jan 2025 confirmed. DJEFF has released on Spinnin' Deep and Diplo's Higher Ground, giving the label international credibility. Email published on official website kazukuta-records.com.

name: Timeless Moment
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic house; melodic techno
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2016, Brazil. Premier melodic/progressive house label from Brazil with global recognition. 'Timeless 2025' compilation released in 2025. 881 Progressive House releases on Beatport. Support from Solomun, Black Coffee, Pete Tong (BBC Radio 1), Hernan Cattaneo. Demo email confirmed via LabelsBase and label website.

name: Area Verde
genre_tags: progressive house; melodic house; melodic techno
requirements: SoundCloud secret links only | All tracks in one secret SoundCloud playlist | Maximum 5 tracks | Include text in email body (not just a link)
why_it_belongs: Founded 2019, Brazil (IAMT Music Group). One of 5 labels in Beatport Hype accelerator program. Active 2024-2025 with releases including 'Best Melodic & Progressive House 2024' compilation on Beatport. 213 Progressive House + 92 Melodic House & Techno releases on Beatport. Runs open producer competitions via LabelRadar. Clear public demo email with requirements.

name: Nube Music Records
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2016, Argentina. Partners with Proton Label network. Active December 2024 release (pre-order 'Game Over' EP) confirmed on Beatport. Focuses on progressive house, deep house, and deep techno from Argentine and international artists. Demo email listed on LabelsBase.

name: Under Pressure Records South Africa
genre_tags: afro house; afro tech; deep house
requirements: Afro house and adjacent deep house only
why_it_belongs: Founded 2012 by Soul Varti, influential Afro House label from South Africa. Active releases confirmed through 2025 (UPR Vaults Locks Unchained Vol. III Oct 2025, 'Christina' Aug 2025). Features South African producers KingTouch, Smallistic, Deep Sen, Hypaphonik, DJ Tears PLK. Contact email cited across multiple licensing and submission reference sources.

name: Midnight Riot Records
genre_tags: nu-disco; disco; balearic; house; boogie; afro house
requirements: Private SoundCloud links only | Yam Who personally listens to every demo
why_it_belongs: London's premier nu-disco/balearic imprint, run by Yam Who? since 2012. Consistently in Traxsource top-200 and lands numerous compilations per year. Actively released throughout 2024-2025 ('The Finest 2024', 'Set Me Free', 'Balearic Headspace Vol 7'). Known for breaking unknown disco and house producers — ideal stepping stone for the slice.

name: Sol Selectas
genre_tags: organic house; tribal house; deep house; downtempo; afro
requirements: Send private SoundCloud links via SoundCloud DM only | Send only a few best tracks | Include bio/concept background | Tracks should be mastered, even basic home master | Replies only if interested — be patient
why_it_belongs: NYC-founded, LA-based organic-house powerhouse run by Sabo since 2006. Home of the 'Summer Sol' and 'Global Entry' compilation series — key tastemaker releases in the organic/tribal house scene. Active in 2025 ('Pura Sol', 'Summer Sol X'). Sabo explicitly stated he listens personally to every SoundCloud DM submission.

name: Maccabi House
genre_tags: melodic house; deep house; psychedelic house; tech house
requirements: Primary channel: Trackstack portal at tstack.app/maccabihouse | Alternative: maccabihouse@gmail.com
why_it_belongs: Tel Aviv imprint run by Adam Ten, one of the most internationally hyped melodic/psychedelic house acts of 2024-2025 (Coachella, Insomniac shows). Roster includes Luke Alessi, Rafael, and others. Active releases throughout 2024-2025 ('Like This' March 2025, 'All Stars 007' March 2025). Open Trackstack portal confirms they accept cold demos. Music played by Black Coffee, Solomun, FISHER.

name: STEREOHYPE
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | Label also historically accepted direct email demos per Instagram post (June 2024) but email not confirmed — use LabelRadar as primary
why_it_belongs: James Hype's own artist label, founded 2019. One of the most-streamed tech house acts globally. Active releases in 2024-2025 (e.g. 'Behaviour' feat. A.D.O.R. 2025, 'More Of The Same' with Tita Lau 2025). Confirmed open LabelRadar demo portal — very accessible for unknown producers seeking a high-profile tech-house co-sign.

name: Slow Life
genre_tags: deep house; progressive house; tech house; organic house
key_people: S. Moreira; Cecilio; Laurine; Santi Uribe / Indi Zone
requirements: Demos only via SoundCloud DM (stated on their social media) | info@slowlifemusic.org for general inquiries
why_it_belongs: Berlin-based collective-label active since 2011, consistently releasing quality deep/progressive house on vinyl. Catalog now past SL041 (April 2025). Niche underground reach: distributed via Redeye, Yoyaku, Newtone. Accepts cold demos purely via SoundCloud DM — accessible entry point for unknown artists with a deep/progressive sound.

name: Phantasy Sound
genre_tags: house; indie dance; electronica; disco; psychedelic
requirements: Email demos to above address | General/licensing inquiries: phantasyhq@gmail.com
why_it_belongs: London label run by DJ legend Erol Alkan since 2007. UK's most artistically ambitious house-adjacent imprint; roster includes Roman Flügel, Factory Floor, Tom Rowlands. Releases very active in 2024-2025 (Roman Flügel 'No Solutions EP' Nov 2024, Factory Floor PH153 Jan 2025). Official About Us page links directly to demos@phantasysound.co.uk — genuine cold-demo channel.

name: Bastard Jazz Recordings
genre_tags: disco; house; nu-disco; dub; afro; downtempo
requirements: General inquiry email also used for demo submissions
why_it_belongs: Brooklyn-based label since 2001, now one of the most respected independent disco/house imprints in the US. 143+ nu-disco catalog entries on Beatport. Active releases throughout 2025 (Captain Planet & Tony Allen 'Tony's House' Aug 2025, Eliot Lipp EP May 2025, Peter Matson Jan 2025). Artists like Lord Echo, Robohands, Illa J. Confirmed cold-demo-friendly via general contact email. Genre overlap strong for disco/Afro/house slice.

name: FHUO Records
genre_tags: deep house; house; electronica; indie dance
requirements: No public demo channel | Label's own SoundCloud states 'don't write us at: forheavenuseonly@gmail.com' — they do not accept unsolicited demos | Relationship/referral only
why_it_belongs: London imprint by Folamour — one of the most distinctive deep house artists of the era. Active 2024-2025 releases including 'Oyabun', 'Chapeau rouge', 'Ordinary Drugs', and the album 'Movement Therapy' (2025). Artists like Kimosabe, Madcat, Parviz on roster. Folamour's taste-making profile means a release here carries significant weight in the European deep house community.

name: Pinchy & Friends
genre_tags: deep house; downtempo; leftfield; disco; world music
requirements: No public demo channel confirmed | Serendeepity distributes label (info@serendeepity.net may be a distribution contact but not a demo channel) | Bandcamp contact form or warm intro recommended
why_it_belongs: LA-based vinyl-focused imprint, catalog PF001–PF021+. Releases eclectic leftfield deep house, Afro-influenced, and disco-house. Artists include Alex Kassian, Exotic Gardens, Dreems. Still actively releasing (PF020 Coyote 'Nyabinghi LP', PF021 'Afternoon Dubs' pre-order 2025). Distributed by Serendeepity and respected in the underground. No cold-demo email confirmed publicly.
